sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27690" key="dixo/reios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δι-χόρειος</orth> (sc. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πούς</foreign>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27690.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ditrochaeus,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
